overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed riding through a futuristic neon-lit urban canyon transitioning onto desert highways. The footage showcases ray-traced graphics with flying vehicles, massive billboards, and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban canyon with towering megabuildings

events.description: exiting dense urban canyon onto open highway

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed through narrow city streets between towering buildings

entered.detail: tall glass and steel cyberpunk tower with neon accents
massive industrial building with pipes and scaffolding
concrete highway overpass spanning the road ahead
large digital billboard displaying yellow advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle ride through a narrow futuristic urban canyon. Towering megabuildings flank both sides with neon billboards attached, while the camera approaches a concrete overpass. The lighting is partially shaded by the tall structures.

events.description: emerging from building shadows into direct sunlight
passing under highway overpass with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway leaving the dense city center behind

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with support columns
tall electricity pylons with multiple cables
distant mountain range visible on the horizon
large circular building with metallic exterior

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges from the urban canyon into bright sunlight on a wide multi-lane highway. The scene opens up to reveal distant mountains and desert vegetation along the roadside. The camera passes under several highway overpasses with large digital billboards.

events.description: taking exit ramp and turning right onto desert road
flying vehicle appears overhead in the distance

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn onto a desert highway while maintaining high speed

entered.detail: arid landscape with dry bushes and dirt shoulders
tall desert plants scattered along the roadside
futuristic hovering car in the sky
large green road sign with white text

segments.scene_description: The rider takes a turn onto a desert highway surrounded by arid terrain and Joshua trees. The environment shifts to a more open landscape with distant mountains. A flying vehicle appears in the sky, hovering above the road ahead.

agents.ego_description: cruising on highway with flying vehicle visible above and city skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: flying car hovering above the highway moving forward slowly

entered.detail: large advertisement featuring stylized character graphics
tall digital screen displaying human figure
futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle approaching the city outskirts with massive commercial billboards lining the highway. The flying vehicle passes directly overhead, and futuristic skyscrapers become visible on the horizon against the desert backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban canyon into a vast, sun-drenched desert landscape. It begins by weaving through towering megabuildings and shaded concrete overpasses, where the view is framed by massive neon billboards. As the rider emerges from the city's shadow, the scene opens abruptly into bright sunlight on a wide multi-lane highway flanked by desert vegetation and distant mountains. The camera then follows a turn onto an arid road lined with Joshua trees, where a flying vehicle appears hovering in the open sky. Finally, the environment shifts toward the city outskirts as the flying vehicle passes directly overhead and futuristic skyscrapers reappear on the horizon against the desert backdrop.
